---
name: Correction
about: Report a factual error or broken claim in a published piece
title: "correction: <piece slug> — <short>"
labels: correction
---

<!-- Use for a factual error in something we've shipped. Not for style nitpicks. -->

## Piece
Slug / title / published URL.

## The claim as published
Quote the exact wording.

## Why it's wrong
What's incorrect, and the correct version.

## Evidence
Resolvable source(s) supporting the correction (link / DOI / quote).

## Fix
- [ ] Correct the piece
- [ ] Note it in `wiki/topics/anti-patterns.md` if it's a claim worth not repeating
- [ ] Update published channels
